# Pull Request

## Summary

- 

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Installation/release change
- [ ] Maintenance

## Target branch

- [ ] This PR targets `develop`.
- [ ] The maintainer explicitly requested a different target branch.

## Release impact

Use a Conventional Commit PR title so release automation can infer the tag bump.
Add an explicit label if needed.

- [ ] Patch: `fix: ...`, `docs: ...`, `chore: ...`, or equivalent
- [ ] Minor: `feat: ...`
- [ ] Major: `type!: ...` or body includes `BREAKING CHANGE:`
- [ ] No release: apply `release:none`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented when needed.
- [ ] Security-sensitive details are not posted publicly.
- [ ] Local plaintext state implications were considered.
- [ ] I ran the narrow checks or manual smoke tests that cover this change.

## Verification

Commands or manual checks run:
